TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Chris Babb == Chris Babb hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa p'agal tins' tay suruw. kawas tay 1990, ryax sa tay 14 nqu tay 2, Chris Babb, squliq na p'unro. Chris Babb mrkyas ru htagan beh sa Kansas.suruw lga,hiya cingasal musa beh Arlington,Texas. hiya yaba ga mtzyaw syukan bbzilan maki lingay Dallas. Babb yaba ga Mike yaya ga Nikki.cyux qutux ssew mlikuy lalu nya ga Nick. pincyuwagan nya' cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: == ʦ~ʨħris~ɕ βaββ == ʦ~ʨħris~ɕ βaββ ħjaʔɣa nβa pɣnawʔ mariʔ mis~ɕuw qanij, qutux s~ɕa pʔaɣal tins~ɕʔ taj s~ɕuruw. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, ʦ~ʨħris~ɕ βaββ, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨħris~ɕ βaββ mrkjas~ɕ ru ħtaɣan βeħ s~ɕa kans~ɕas~ɕ.s~ɕuruw lɣa,ħija ʦ~ʨiŋas~ɕal mus~ɕa βeħ arliŋton,texas~ɕ. ħija jaβa ɣa mtzjaw s~ɕjukan ββzilan maki liŋaj *allas~ɕ. βaββ jaβa ɣa mike jaja ɣa nikki.ʦ~ʨjux qutux s~ɕs~ɕew mlikuj lalu nja ɣa niʦ~ʨk. pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan njaʔ ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
S.FORM: == Chris Babb == Chris Babb hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa p'agal tins' tay suruw. kawas tay 1990, ryax sa tay 14 nqu tay 2, Chris Babb, squliq na p'unro. Chris Babb mrkyas ru htagan beh sa Kansas.suruw lga,hiya cingasal musa beh Arlington,Texas. hiya yaba ga mtzyaw syukan bbzilan maki lingay Dallas. Babb yaba ga Mike yaya ga Nikki.cyux qutux ssew mlikuy lalu nya ga Nick. pincyuwagan nya' cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: == ʦ~ʨħris~ɕ βaββ == ʦ~ʨħris~ɕ βaββ ħjaʔɣa nβa pɣnawʔ mariʔ mis~ɕuw qanij, qutux s~ɕa pʔaɣal tins~ɕʔ taj s~ɕuruw. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, ʦ~ʨħris~ɕ βaββ, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨħris~ɕ βaββ mrkjas~ɕ ru ħtaɣan βeħ s~ɕa kans~ɕas~ɕ.s~ɕuruw lɣa,ħija ʦ~ʨiŋas~ɕal mus~ɕa βeħ arliŋton,texas~ɕ. ħija jaβa ɣa mtzjaw s~ɕjukan ββzilan maki liŋaj *allas~ɕ. βaββ jaβa ɣa mike jaja ɣa nikki.ʦ~ʨjux qutux s~ɕs~ɕew mlikuj lalu nja ɣa niʦ~ʨk. pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan njaʔ ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
